generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on motor for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn RobotAxisEnvironment
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn RobotAxisEnvironment
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor current for torque calculation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn RobotAxisEnvironment
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (I_M) from sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, MQTTEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque (τ) from motor current"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) derived from position sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output (r_M) from dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearboxOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox output (r_G) from dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted, MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated overall system output (r_out) from dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, GearboxPositionDataTransmitted, MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SysML_BDD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysML_IBD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance Simulink_CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of Coulomb-Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of Stribeck friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DataCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation models for torque and velocity derivation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for data linking"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for visualization of friction models and data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionPhysicalRelationshipsInsight, AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction
    base:isContainedIn RobotAxisEnvironment
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization in a dashboard for understanding physical relationships and improving robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
    base:isContainedIn RobotAxisEnvironment
]

instance FrictionPhysicalRelationshipsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into physical relationships of joint friction"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of physical relationships for improved understanding"
]

instance AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Decisions to adjust control algorithms for improved motion accuracy based on friction model identification"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed of 75°/s, used for machining applications"
    base:contains MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor, FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with live measurements during robot operation for continuous friction model updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot axis with sensor data via MQTT, SysML-based structural model, Simulink simulation models, Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for traceability, and unified dashboard for visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, covering real-time wear and operational changes during robot use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity validated by comparing simulated data (from Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre models) against measured data to detect deviations and improve friction model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming between physical robot and digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) per Industrie 4.0 standards, SysML for system modeling as per industry standards."
]
